archimate:ApplicationService.name: Remote collaboration and communication
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: A software application service that enables individuals or teams to collaborate and communicate effectively, regardless of their physical locations. It provides tools and features such as video conferencing, instant messaging, document sharing, and virtual whiteboards to support real-time or asynchronous interactions. The Remote Collaboration and Communication application service bridges geographical and temporal gaps, facilitating seamless collaboration and communication in remote or distributed work environments.
Source: Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/smarterwithgartner/the-future-of-work-collaboration-tools-and-technologies/
LOST view: TVA-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RemoteCollaborationAndCommunicationApplicationService
ABB name: egovera:RemoteCollaborationAndCommunicationApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RemoteCollaborationAndCommunicationApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalWorkplaceApplicationService

properties.value: A software application service that enables individuals or teams to collaborate and communicate effectively, regardless of their physical locations. It provides tools and features such as video conferencing, instant messaging, document sharing, and virtual whiteboards to support real-time or asynchronous interactions. The Remote Collaboration and Communication application service bridges geographical and temporal gaps, facilitating seamless collaboration and communication in remote or distributed work environments.
